TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_naciya_a_tademaw, title = naciya_a_tademaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/naciya_a_tademaw} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == nciyaatademaw naciya a tademaw "kamu nu inti" ŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§óŗ§ĺÔľõNńĀg, i into nu amisan pasawali a buyubuyu'an matatules tu mintin idaw tu takuliyaway a tademaw han pangangan, tatengaay sa 16 a niyadu' misiteked ku duduce nu heni a kaudip. nciyaatademaw ťā£Śä†šļļ(ŚćįŚúįŤ™ě:ŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§óŗ§ĺÔľõNńĀgńĀ), . nilaculan Naciya a tademaw u kamu nuheni sa nu cang min a kakawsam , hatu nu amis nu into, musakaku tu inaw atu kawciysu a tademaw atu timul nu intu musakamu tu talupica a kamu atu talupica a tademaw malecad, . nukatuuday malakalak i nakalanpang. Idaw ku masasengiay nuheni tu kakawsan atu lalangawan, idaw ku 16 a naniyadu'an. "naciya a tademaw" uheni panganganay u "lung a bunacadan"nu laylay sa, u NńĀgńĀu "lung" sananay a imisa. NńĀgńĀŚįĪśėĮ"ťĺć"ÁöĄśĄŹśÄĚ. u kitidaan naciya abinacadan a nikaudip i into asamupang, naciyalanpang atu cungku cang nu timulan atu minti nu tipan tu pasaamis a buyubuyu'an "pakay a buyu',yizen a buyu'" u labu nuheni yadah ku kamu tu cacanan, nuka sakayhekal nu naciya ku kamu. naciya a bunacadan kakawsa tu daduducen icelang ku hitay nu heni, kitidaan itodaaca i tungduh nu buyu', u niyad' tu niyadu' maaulic tu . katukuh 19 a siki nudikudan nuka masasuada tu tidaay a malepacaw, i inku atademaw tayni satu kiyu maselep ku pilitangah. labunuluma' nu naciya nusiyakay masakaput tu. nikalwacawa cacay ku tatama cacay ku tatayna, nika yu mukasihenay unikaleacawa palemang sa masasukaydih , mududuc tu sakakaay awawa ku situngusay tu daduducen nu labu nu luma', u heni idaw ku Morung daduducen, u sining nuayawan nu kikung kanca ihekal mueneng. Morung . likisi u henu mahkatayni ku ingku widasa u ahawmu a kanatali ku sakasicabay, 1830 amihcaan u kingly nuheni atu naciya a tumuk idaw ku kasasulit nu hwni caay kasasuada. u naciya misasubelih tu mahiniay a kasasudang, caypisengal a malepacaw malealaw tu pala' atu asamupang nu kitidaan. Uinku matulin kuni patayda tu hitay maydih palekal tu kitidaan nu hitay, 1878 amihcaan kiya tatengaay tu nu ingku atu nu intu matatulak.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == n ¶ijaatad…ômaw na ¶ija a tad…ômaw "kamu nu inti" *****n*g, i into nu amisan pasawar~…ĺi a bujubuju Ē~ °an matatur~…ĺ…ôs tu mintin idaw tu takur~…ĺijawaj a tad…ômaw ńßan paŇčaŇčan, tat…ôŇčaaj sa ** a nijadu Ē~ ° misit…ôk…ôd ku dudu ¶…ô nu ńß…ôni a kaudip. n ¶ijaatad…ômaw ***(***:*****n*g*), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan na ¶ija a tad…ômaw u kamu nuńß…ôni sa nu ¶aŇč min a kakawsam , ńßatu nu amis nu into, musakaku tu inaw atu kaw ¶ijsu a tad…ômaw atu timur~…ĺ nu intu musakamu tu tar~…ĺupi ¶a a kamu atu tar~…ĺupi ¶a a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, . nukatuudaj mar~…ĺakar~…ĺak i nakar~…ĺanpaŇč. idaw ku masas…ôŇčiaj nuńß…ôni tu kakawsan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, idaw ku ** a nanijadu Ē~ °an. "na ¶ija a tad…ômaw" uńß…ôni paŇčaŇčanaj u "r~…ĺuŇč a buna ¶adan"nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj sa, u n*g*u "r~…ĺuŇč" sananaj a imisa. n*g***"*"***. u kitidaan na ¶ija abina ¶adan a nikaudip i into asamupaŇč, na ¶ijar~…ĺanpaŇč atu ¶uŇčku ¶aŇč nu timur~…ĺan atu minti nu tipan tu pasaamis a bujubuju Ē~ °an "pakaj a buju Ē~ °,jiz…ôn a buju Ē~ °" u r~…ĺabu nuńß…ôni jadańß ku kamu tu ¶a ¶anan, nuka sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu na ¶ija ku kamu. na ¶ija a buna ¶adan kakawsa tu dadudu ¶…ôn i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku ńßitaj nu ńß…ôni, kitidaan itodaa ¶a i tuŇčduńß nu buju Ē~ °, u nijad Ē~ ° tu nijadu Ē~ ° maaur~…ĺi ¶ tu . katukuńß ** a siki nudikudan nuka masasuada tu tidaaj a mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, i inku atad…ômaw tajni satu kiju mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp ku pir~…ĺitaŇčańß. r~…ĺabunur~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu na ¶ija nusijakaj masakaput tu. nikar~…ĺwa ¶awa ¶a ¶aj ku tatama ¶a ¶aj ku tatajna, nika ju mukasińß…ônaj unikar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awa par~…ĺ…ômaŇč sa masasukajdińß , mududu ¶ tu sakakaaj awawa ku situŇčusaj tu dadudu ¶…ôn nu r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, u ńß…ôni idaw ku moruŇč dadudu ¶…ôn, u siniŇč nuajawan nu kikuŇč kan ¶a ińß…ôkar~…ĺ mu…ôn…ôŇč. moruŇč . r~…ĺikisi u ńß…ônu mańßkatajni ku iŇčku widasa u ańßawmu a kanatar~…ĺi ku sakasi ¶abaj, **** amińß ¶aan u kiŇčr~…ĺj nuńß…ôni atu na ¶ija a tumuk idaw ku kasasur~…ĺit nu ńßwni ¶aaj kasasuada. u na ¶ija misasub…ôr~…ĺińß tu mańßiniaj a kasasudaŇč, ¶ajpis…ôŇčar~…ĺ a mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw mar~…ĺ…ôar~…ĺaw tu par~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu asamupaŇč nu kitidaan. uinku matur~…ĺin kuni patajda tu ńßitaj majdińß par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu kitidaan nu ńßitaj, **** amińß ¶aan kija tat…ôŇčaaj tu nu iŇčku atu nu intu matatur~…ĺak.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == nciyaatademaw naciya a tademaw "kamu nu inti" ŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§óŗ§ĺÔľõNńĀg, i into nu amisan pasawali a buyubuyu'an matatules tu mintin idaw tu takuliyaway a tademaw han pangangan, tatengaay sa 16 a niyadu' misiteked ku duduce nu heni a kaudip. nciyaatademaw ťā£Śä†šļļ(ŚćįŚúįŤ™ě:ŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§óŗ§ĺÔľõNńĀgńĀ), . nilaculan Naciya a tademaw u kamu nuheni sa nu cang min a kakawsam , hatu nu amis nu into, musakaku tu inaw atu kawciysu a tademaw atu timul nu intu musakamu tu talupica a kamu atu talupica a tademaw malecad, . nukatuuday malakalak i nakalanpang. Idaw ku masasengiay nuheni tu kakawsan atu lalangawan, idaw ku 16 a naniyadu'an. "naciya a tademaw" uheni panganganay u "lung a bunacadan"nu laylay sa, u NńĀgńĀu "lung" sananay a imisa. NńĀgńĀŚįĪśėĮ"ťĺć"ÁöĄśĄŹśÄĚ. u kitidaan naciya abinacadan a nikaudip i into asamupang, naciyalanpang atu cungku cang nu timulan atu minti nu tipan tu pasaamis a buyubuyu'an "pakay a buyu',yizen a buyu'" u labu nuheni yadah ku kamu tu cacanan, nuka sakayhekal nu naciya ku kamu. naciya a bunacadan kakawsa tu daduducen icelang ku hitay nu heni, kitidaan itodaaca i tungduh nu buyu', u niyad' tu niyadu' maaulic tu . katukuh 19 a siki nudikudan nuka masasuada tu tidaay a malepacaw, i inku atademaw tayni satu kiyu maselep ku pilitangah. labunuluma' nu naciya nusiyakay masakaput tu. nikalwacawa cacay ku tatama cacay ku tatayna, nika yu mukasihenay unikaleacawa palemang sa masasukaydih , mududuc tu sakakaay awawa ku situngusay tu daduducen nu labu nu luma', u heni idaw ku Morung daduducen, u sining nuayawan nu kikung kanca ihekal mueneng. Morung . likisi u henu mahkatayni ku ingku widasa u ahawmu a kanatali ku sakasicabay, 1830 amihcaan u kingly nuheni atu naciya a tumuk idaw ku kasasulit nu hwni caay kasasuada. u naciya misasubelih tu mahiniay a kasasudang, caypisengal a malepacaw malealaw tu pala' atu asamupang nu kitidaan. Uinku matulin kuni patayda tu hitay maydih palekal tu kitidaan nu hitay, 1878 amihcaan kiya tatengaay tu nu ingku atu nu intu matatulak.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == n ¶ijaatad…ômaw na ¶ija a tad…ômaw "kamu nu inti" *****n*g, i into nu amisan pasawar~…ĺi a bujubuju Ē~ °an matatur~…ĺ…ôs tu mintin idaw tu takur~…ĺijawaj a tad…ômaw ńßan paŇčaŇčan, tat…ôŇčaaj sa ** a nijadu Ē~ ° misit…ôk…ôd ku dudu ¶…ô nu ńß…ôni a kaudip. n ¶ijaatad…ômaw ***(***:*****n*g*), . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan na ¶ija a tad…ômaw u kamu nuńß…ôni sa nu ¶aŇč min a kakawsam , ńßatu nu amis nu into, musakaku tu inaw atu kaw ¶ijsu a tad…ômaw atu timur~…ĺ nu intu musakamu tu tar~…ĺupi ¶a a kamu atu tar~…ĺupi ¶a a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, . nukatuudaj mar~…ĺakar~…ĺak i nakar~…ĺanpaŇč. idaw ku masas…ôŇčiaj nuńß…ôni tu kakawsan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, idaw ku ** a nanijadu Ē~ °an. "na ¶ija a tad…ômaw" uńß…ôni paŇčaŇčanaj u "r~…ĺuŇč a buna ¶adan"nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj sa, u n*g*u "r~…ĺuŇč" sananaj a imisa. n*g***"*"***. u kitidaan na ¶ija abina ¶adan a nikaudip i into asamupaŇč, na ¶ijar~…ĺanpaŇč atu ¶uŇčku ¶aŇč nu timur~…ĺan atu minti nu tipan tu pasaamis a bujubuju Ē~ °an "pakaj a buju Ē~ °,jiz…ôn a buju Ē~ °" u r~…ĺabu nuńß…ôni jadańß ku kamu tu ¶a ¶anan, nuka sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu na ¶ija ku kamu. na ¶ija a buna ¶adan kakawsa tu dadudu ¶…ôn i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku ńßitaj nu ńß…ôni, kitidaan itodaa ¶a i tuŇčduńß nu buju Ē~ °, u nijad Ē~ ° tu nijadu Ē~ ° maaur~…ĺi ¶ tu . katukuńß ** a siki nudikudan nuka masasuada tu tidaaj a mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, i inku atad…ômaw tajni satu kiju mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp ku pir~…ĺitaŇčańß. r~…ĺabunur~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu na ¶ija nusijakaj masakaput tu. nikar~…ĺwa ¶awa ¶a ¶aj ku tatama ¶a ¶aj ku tatajna, nika ju mukasińß…ônaj unikar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awa par~…ĺ…ômaŇč sa masasukajdińß , mududu ¶ tu sakakaaj awawa ku situŇčusaj tu dadudu ¶…ôn nu r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, u ńß…ôni idaw ku moruŇč dadudu ¶…ôn, u siniŇč nuajawan nu kikuŇč kan ¶a ińß…ôkar~…ĺ mu…ôn…ôŇč. moruŇč . r~…ĺikisi u ńß…ônu mańßkatajni ku iŇčku widasa u ańßawmu a kanatar~…ĺi ku sakasi ¶abaj, **** amińß ¶aan u kiŇčr~…ĺj nuńß…ôni atu na ¶ija a tumuk idaw ku kasasur~…ĺit nu ńßwni ¶aaj kasasuada. u na ¶ija misasub…ôr~…ĺińß tu mańßiniaj a kasasudaŇč, ¶ajpis…ôŇčar~…ĺ a mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw mar~…ĺ…ôar~…ĺaw tu par~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu asamupaŇč nu kitidaan. uinku matur~…ĺin kuni patajda tu ńßitaj majdińß par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu kitidaan nu ńßitaj, **** amińß ¶aan kija tat…ôŇčaaj tu nu iŇčku atu nu intu matatur~…ĺak.
